summary: A Go-based modular testing framework with detector, runner, assertion, and reporting capabilities, featuring plugin support and Kubernetes examples.
concerns: recent commits are entirely automated agent metadata churn with no functional changes
1 staged file suggests incomplete or interrupted work
lack of implementation files in hot files indicates possible test-only coverage or missing source context
suggestions: investigate the staged changes to determine if they represent abandoned work
clean up automated agent tracking commits to improve git history clarity
review source files in detector, schema, and reporter to ensure test coverage matches implementation
